document.title: Life Cycle Report for GT Series Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

sourceSummary.oneLine: Life Cycle Report defining the Expected Service Life of the Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector model HnX-R1, reference numbers GT1717C and GT1717CP.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports expected service life documentation for the detector based on POE injector capacitor estimated life and use assumptions.
keyPoints: The document defines the Expected Service Life of the Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
The assessed model name is HnX-R1 with reference numbers GT1717C and GT1717CP.
The POE Injector is identified as the detector main DC power supply.
Estimated capacitor life is calculated as 48,502.9 hours at 59℃.
Expected Service Life is stated as about 5 years.

evidence.claim: The document defines the Expected Service Life of the Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: This document defines the Expected Service Life of the Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector (Ref no. GT1717C, GT1717CP).

evidence.claim: The relevant part key is the POE Injector, described as the detector main DC power supply.
evidence.evidenceText: POE Injector (Detector main DC power supply)

evidence.claim: The POE injector model is POE29U-1AT(PL)D-R and the vendor is Phihong USA.
evidence.evidenceText: Model Name ... POE29U-1AT(PL)D-R ... Vendor Phihong USA

evidence.claim: The life calculation basis uses estimated life of KMG Series capacitor from Samyoung Electronics.
evidence.evidenceText: Estimated life of KMG Series capacitor from Samyoung Electronics.

evidence.claim: The capacitor estimated life formula is L = L0 x 2^((Tmax - Ta)/10).
The calculated result is 48,502.9 hours at 59℃.
Average daily use is less than 9 hours per day.
evidence.evidenceText: Average daily use: Less than 9 hours per day

evidence.claim: Reasonably foreseeable worst usage is 24 hours a day with a battery charger plugged in.
evidence.evidenceText: Reasonably foreseeable worst usage: Using for 24 hours a day with a battery charger plugged in

evidence.claim: The expected service life is about 5 years.
